description: a(n) = denominator q of the fraction p/q that minimizes |m/n - p/q| with m/n != p/q, where p is 1 or prime, q is prime, q < n, and m ranges from 1 to n - 1, with this rule to ensure uniqueness: if for given n there is more than one minimizing triple (m, p, q), then choose the greatest such m, then greatest q, then greatest p.
